objective:
Unify Google Antigravity provider-workspace model usage rows under the same picker-facing model names used at call time, instead of leaving historical suffix/compat/wire IDs fragmented in the Usage table.

Problem (live UI evidence from localhost:10100/#providers/workspace Google Antigravity → 사용량):
- Model breakdown currently shows split rows like gemini-3.5-flash-mid, gemini-3.5-flash-low, gemini-3.5-flash-high, gemini-3-flash-agent, gemini-3.1-pro-low, gemini-3.1-pro-high, gemini-pro-agent, etc.
- After antigravity effort routing, callers pick collapsed base models (gemini-3.6-flash, gemini-3.1-pro, claude-opus-4-6-thinking, …) and the adapter maps effort to CCA wire IDs. Usage must aggregate under those call/picker model names so one call model = one usage row.

Scope IN:
- Server-side usage aggregation/canonicalization for google-antigravity so historical and current logs collapse to picker/call model ids.
- Provider workspace Usage tab display that consumes /api/usage models rows: show the unified model name, not raw wire/resolved suffix IDs.
- Focused regression tests proving aliases/wire IDs/suffix variants for the same base model merge requests/tokens/cost/share.
- Numbered devlog unit under devlog/_plan/ with docs-first roadmap + implementation evidence.
- Local commits as work lands. Typecheck + focused usage/antigravity tests green.

Scope OUT:
- No git push / PR / release / npm publish unless user later asks.
- No broad rewrite of non-Antigravity usage semantics (OpenAI virtual models, combo attempts) except avoiding regressions.
- No provider picker redesign, no quota API changes, no GUI redesign beyond necessary display of unified model names.
- Do not touch unrelated dirty work if any appears.

Acceptance / terminal outcomes:
- DONE: Antigravity usage breakdown groups by call/picker model matching invocation; estimated cost/tokens/requests/share are summed; tests cover alias collapse; typecheck + focused tests pass; live UI or API evidence shows merged rows; goalplan criteria met with capturedEvidence.
- NOOP: if already unified after re-verification.
- BLOCKED / NEEDS_HUMAN / UNSAFE / BUDGET_EXHAUSTED as appropriate.

Verification evidence expected:
- bun run typecheck
- bun test tests/usage-summary.test.ts tests/usage-cost.test.ts (and any new focused test)
- optional: /api/usage?range=30d model rows for google-antigravity show collapsed base ids
- browser provider workspace Usage tab no longer lists fragmented 3.5-flash-* / suffix rows as separate primary identities when they map to the same call model

Work-phase plan (docs-first HOTL):
1. WP0 docs-only: research current log fields, antigravity alias maps, summary aggregation key, GUI display, write decade docs.
2. WP1 implement canonical model attribution for usage aggregation + tests.
3. WP2 GUI/display + live verification if still needed after server collapse.
4. WP3 final verification/docs closeout.

First work-phase: WP0 docs-only roadmap lock with Sol-assisted research, then implementation cycles.
